title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Yatra Hotels

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Yatra Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Yatra Hotels in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Yatra Hotels:
Yatra Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yatra Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
